name: Prince
title: Last known photo of Prince — captured by paparazzi outside a Walgreens in Minnetonka, Minnesota, on the evening of April 20, 2016, hours before his death.
description: The last known photo of Prince was taken by paparazzi outside a Walgreens in Minnetonka, Minnesota, on the evening of April 20, 2016. TMZ later reported he had stopped there to pick up a prescription. The next morning, on April 21, 2016, Prince was found unresponsive in an elevator at his Paisley Park compound in Chanhassen and pronounced dead at the scene. A medical examiner later ruled the death an accidental overdose of fentanyl. He was 57 years old.

lyrics.text:
Dearly beloved
We are gathered here today
To get through this thing called “life”
Electric word, life
It means forever, and that's a mighty long time
But I'm here to tell you there's something else:
The afterworld
A world of never ending happiness
You can always see the sun, day or night
So when you call up that shrink in Beverly Hills
You know the one, Dr. Everything'll-Be-All-Right
Instead of asking him how much of your time is left
Ask him how much of your mind, babe
'Cause in this life
Things are much harder than in the afterworld
In this life
You're on your own
And if de-elevator tries to bring you down
Go crazy, punch a higher floor

bio: Prince Rogers Nelson, known mononymously as Prince, was an American singer, songwriter, multi-instrumentalist, and producer. Across a four-decade career he released 39 studio albums and is widely regarded as one of the greatest musicians of his generation. Defining works include 1999 (1982), Purple Rain (1984), and Sign o' the Times (1987). He was inducted into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame in 2004.
